'''Plooriod III''', the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Plooriod system/Legends|Plooriod system]], was an agricultural territory of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. Plooriod III had a vast [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] with small spire-like islands dotting the surface.

==History==
[[File:Plooriod3.png|thumb|left|200px|[[Ghorin's castle]].]]

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]] lived there and ruled the [[Greater Plooriod Cluster]] from his [[Ghorin's castle|luxurious mansion]], which was built upon one of the islands.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Overlord Ghorin was executed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in his mansion for allegedly providing poisoned grain for the Empire. He had in fact been framed by the Rebels as retaliation for supplying them with poisoned grain.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], has an entry for [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]] which refers to his castle on [[Plooriod IV]]. This contradicts the ''Imperial Pursuit'' cut scene, which shows the castle on Plooriod III. Anyway, the Plooriod III's and Plooriod IV's entries are correct.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
